prompt: I need to write unit tests for my authentication middleware. The middleware checks JWT tokens, handles expired tokens, missing tokens, and invalid signatures. The middleware is at src/middleware/auth.ts and uses jsonwebtoken.

assertions.text: Chooses to delegate test writing to OpenCode rather than writing tests directly
Creates an OpenCode session before sending a prompt
The prompt to OpenCode references the source middleware file (src/middleware/auth.ts) so the agent can read it
The prompt or review plan mentions all 4 edge cases: valid token, expired token, missing token, invalid signature
Plans to review generated tests for completeness and correctness, not just accept them blindly
